visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black T-shirt presents two small blue boxes labeled 'LABUBU' in an indoor setting with wooden floors and neutral walls. She gestures excitedly, holding the boxes close to the camera lens to show the egg-themed packaging details. (2) She carefully unboxes a speckled, cream-colored egg, holding it up for a size comparison against her hand. She looks into the camera with a curious and slightly skeptical expression while tapping the hard surface of the object. (3) She places the egg into a large stainless steel bowl filled with water, which sits on a white table. The camera uses a medium close-up shot as the egg begins to float and she waves goodbye to the camera lens with a smile. (4) Transitioning to a different outfit including a grey cap and white shirt, she reacts with a facial expression of disgust as she shows the egg in the water starting to crack after four hours, revealing a blue interior. (5) Wearing transparent plastic gloves, she reaches into the water to retrieve a soggy, blue and white rabbit-shaped toy that has emerged from the shell after 24 hours. She holds it up, displaying its odd, spongy texture and distorted facial features. (6) She compares two different toys: one blue/white and one yellow/green. Both look misshapen and lumpy. She holds them close to the camera, squeezing them to demonstrate their soft, water-logged consistency and weird physical state. (7) In the final phase, she shows the toys after several days; they have expanded significantly but remain distorted. She holds both up to the camera with a pleading, humorous expression, gesturing for viewers to take them as the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: POV. [Slogan]: 🇰🇷韓網爆紅拉布布孵化蛋 Raising Labubu. [Subtitle]: 拉布布養成蛋. (2) [Subtitle]: 韓國又流行. [Variety]: 超級奇怪的東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 現在太多韓國網紅們都在玩這個. (4) [Subtitle]: 需要放在水裡面. [Slogan]: LABUBU 24H. (5) [Subtitle]: 並且要等24小時左右. (6) [Subtitle]: 所以先買了兩個. (7) [Subtitle]: 店家還送了這個貼紙. [Variety]: (所以蛋裡會有這些嗎？). (8) [Subtitle]: 先打開看看. (9) [Variety]: 嗚～. [Subtitle]: 大小 = 鴨蛋. (10) [Variety]: (懷疑). [Subtitle]: 這裡面真的有拉布布嗎？ (11) [Subtitle]: 等一下見！ (12) [Subtitle]: (4小時後). (13) [Subtitle]: 有點噁心😂. (14) [Subtitle]: (24小時後). (15) [Subtitle]: 好怕. (16) [Variety]: 歐買尬!!!. [Subtitle]: 突然裂開的蛋. (17) [Variety]: 有！有！. (18) [Variety]: ?.... [Subtitle]: 瞳孔地震. (19) [Subtitle]: 這是拉布布嗎？ (20) [Variety]: (傷心). [Subtitle]: 哪裡是拉布布. (21) [Subtitle]: (下一個). (22) [Subtitle]: 啊好噁心哦. (23) [Subtitle]: 都長得好奇怪. (24) [Subtitle]: 欸？兩個樣子不一樣. (25) [Subtitle]: 還沒結束. (26) [Subtitle]: 還要把這些在水裡面一段時間. (27) [Subtitle]: 聽說等幾天會變更大！！！ (28) [Subtitle]: 那它會變成真的是像拉布布一樣的大小. (29) [Subtitle]: 等幾天看看吧... [Variety]: 這哪裡是拉布布. [Variety]: 拉發霉？... (30) [Subtitle]: 大家我已經等了三到四天左右. (31) [Subtitle]: 然後我們一起看一下. (32) [Subtitle]: 到底有沒有變大. (33) [Subtitle]: 確實有變大.. [Variety]: ⋯. (34) [Subtitle]: 但好奇怪喔. (35) [Subtitle]: 有人要嗎？我可以免費送. (36) [Subtitle]: 另外一支白色的呢？ (37) [Variety]: 好慘. [Subtitle]: 感覺眼睛被誰咬了一口. (38) [Variety]: (Q軟要幹嘛...). [Subtitle]: 但它比較Q軟一點. (39) [Subtitle]: 可是兩個頭都被壓扁了. (40) [Subtitle]: 拜託請拿走.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, initially wearing a black T-shirt, later wearing a grey cap and a white T-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor living area with wooden flooring, light-colored walls, and furniture like tables and cabinets visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks in Mandarin with a bright, enthusiastic tone over a fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop track. The speech rate is notably fast with frequent expressive inflections and high pitch variability. Sharp rustling sounds of cardboard and plastic packaging are heard clearly in the foreground. (2) A distinct 'pop' sound effect emphasizes the unboxing process while the speaker continues her energetic narration. Her voice exhibits a friendly and slightly comedic tone with no significant ambient noise floor interfering with the signal. The background music maintains a consistent volume and driving electronic tempo. (3) A clear splash sound occurs as an object enters water. The speaker's pitch rises as she anticipates the results of the experiment. The background music continues its steady rhythmic beat with a prominent bass line and synth pads, overlapping perfectly with the clear vocal track. (4) A transition whoosh sound leads into a new phase where the speaker's tone shifts to one of exaggerated disgust and shock. High-pitched vocalizations and quick-fire speech dominate as she reacts to the cracking egg in the water, punctuated by sudden breathy gasps and laughter. (5) Loud shouting and screaming characterize this phase as the speaker reaches into the water to retrieve the toy. Wet, squishy percussive sounds are audible alongside the continuous electronic pop track. Her vocal arousal is at its peak, conveying strong surprise and disappointment in the toy's quality. (6) The speaker's voice lowers into a teasing, sarcastic tone while describing the lumpy appearance of the growth-distorted toys. The background music remains steady until a final fading cut. The audio event density is high throughout, with rapid speech and frequent sound effects shaping the rhythm.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Unboxing -> Process -> Disappointing Reveal -> Growth Result -> Final CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a humorous review of a trending product, the 'Labubu Hatching Egg', by showing its unboxing and the disappointing, distorted results after soaking it in water.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator's critical and humorous tone suggests a personal review rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high audio-visual density and fast editing to create a comedic effect regarding a failed product experience.
